_comment: Apify Google Maps scraper config. Run via 'npm run scrape:apify'. Rotates AU city × trade combinations daily so we don't re-scrape the same area repeatedly. Each daily run yields ~30-50 leads with email addresses (Apify auto-enriches).

rotation._strategy: (day-of-year mod trades.length) selects today's trade. (day-of-year div 7 mod cities.length) selects today's city. Each combination is hit ~once every 2-3 weeks.

_post_processing: scripts/run-apify-scrape.ts processes the output, filters chains and duplicates, and uploads to Instantly via lib/instantly.ts uploadLeadsToInstantly(). Capped at 30 new leads/day to stay within Instantly daily-limit best practice.
